license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ci5ug5
title: How to make a 25-50 mg/ml Chloramphenicol Stock Solution

steps_raw.instruction: Weigh 0.25-0.5 g of Chloramphenicol 00:04:00 Chloramphenicol P212121 Catalog #GB-C-105
Add 10 ml of 95% EtOH (70% may also be used). Dissolve completely. Stock may be kept at -20°C for 1 year. 00:05:00 Ethanol P212121 Catalog #BE-BDH1156
